title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: What technology do you think will have the biggest impact on our lives in the future?
Do you think artificial intelligence will mostly help or harm society?
Would you trust a self-driving car? Why or why not?
What do you think life will be like for young people growing up today?
How do you feel about the rapid pace of technological change?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think artificial intelligence will mostly improve or harm quality of life?
Should there be international regulations to control the development of AI?
What do you think will be the most important skill for humans to have in a world with AI?
